summary: The contrary green frog ignores his mother, tries too late to obey, grieves by the stream, and remembers her whenever rain swells the bank.

adaptationVersions.plannedAlternate: External editor pass after children’s editorial and Korean-language review
adaptationVersions.note: Generated repo-local repair draft; not external human final.

sensitivityNotes: Grief is gentle but real; the mother remains emotionally central.
Repaired by repo-local semantic authenticity pass; external children’s editor, Korean-language, cultural, and child-safety review remain required before final release.

text.enLittle: Mother frog asked him to sit near the reed.
text.enStandard: In the rain-bright stream bank, first, Mother Frog asked him to sit near the reed, so he hopped to the stone. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.
text.koLittle: 청개구리와 어머니가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요
text.koStandard: 청개구리와 어머니가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 청개구리와 어머니가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요.

pages.koreanText: 청개구리와 어머니가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 청개구리와 어머니가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요.
pages.englishText: In the rain-bright stream bank, first, Mother Frog asked him to sit near the reed, so he hopped to the stone. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.
pages.narrationScript: 청개구리와 어머니가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 청개구리와 어머니가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요.

vocabulary.definitionEn: A small green frog.
Doing the reverse of what was asked.

storyBeat.purpose: frog does the opposite of every request (contrary play)
storyBeat.pageTurnHook: Then the next part of contrary play will ask for a braver choice, and the story moves toward mother's patience.
storyBeat.readAloudCue: Read with playful frustration; keep the folktale stakes clear, culturally grounded, and child-safe with musical pauses.
